---
title: "UN Comtrade Premium"
page-layout: article
---

# UN Comtrade Premium

**Provider:** United Nations

## Description

International trade database providing detailed commodity and partner-country statistics reported by national authorities. Supports trade, supply chain, and economic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Government & International Statistics, Trade & Supply Chain Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Government & International Statistics, Trade & Supply Chain Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-un-comtrade)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
